appliedUpdates.description: Fixed device key bootstrap check in login command to use canonical isDeviceBootstrapped() function instead of checking for wrong filenames (device.pub/device.key vs device-keys.json/x25519.key/ed25519.key)
Updated simulateFullInit to create real mors init file layout (device-keys.json, x25519.key, ed25519.key) instead of legacy filenames
